task_completion.description: Navigate to the configuration page for the 'Integration-Tests' job.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the Jenkins job configuration page with 'Integration-Tests' visible in the breadcrumb navigation or page title.
The 'Discard old builds' checkbox is checked under the General configuration section.

task_completion.description: Set the number of days to keep builds to 14.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '14' is entered into the 'Days to keep builds' input field within the Discard old builds section.

task_completion.description: Set the maximum number of builds to keep to 5.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '5' is entered into the 'Max # of builds to keep' input field within the Discard old builds section.

task_completion.description: Add the 'Archive the artifacts' post-build action.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Archive the artifacts' block is visible under the 'Post-build Actions' section of the configuration page.

task_completion.description: Specify the correct file patterns to archive.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The string 'reports/*.xml, reports/*.html' (or similar valid comma-separated format) is entered into the 'Files to archive' input field.
The agent clicks the 'Save' button at the bottom of the configuration page, or the screen shows the job dashboard indicating the configuration was successfully saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the Jenkins web interface to configure the job.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the Jenkins UI, rather than a terminal window executing curl commands or Groovy scripts.

integrity.description: The configuration changes were applied to the correct job.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL bar or Jenkins breadcrumbs clearly show 'Integration-Tests' and not a different job name or a dummy file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Inputs are typed into the actual Jenkins form fields, not a text editor, and there is no evidence of inspecting/modifying HTML to fake the visual output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Job Name: 'Integration-Tests'. The 'Discard old builds' strategy requires setting 'Days to keep builds' to 14 and 'Max # of builds to keep' to 5. The post-build action must be 'Archive the artifacts'. The 'Files to archive' field should contain 'reports/*.xml, reports/*.html' (Jenkins uses comma-separated Ant-style wildcards for this field).
